events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing lockable disconnect is a NEC 430 Part IX violation (disconnect must be within sight of the motor/controller and capable of being locked open) and a LOTO safety gap for an in-service circuit — marked `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective actions (install compliant lockable disconnect, use nearest upstream lockout in the interim).
